creator: decagon.ai

evidence.text: During their vendor evaluation, Decagon’s differentiation became clear quickly. Within weeks, the team was actively testing the platform and seeing results, while competitors struggled to move beyond demos. Beyond speed, Decagon stood out for how easily teams could build and improve agents using Agent Operating Procedures. Combined with built-in testing and analytics, this made it possible to define agent behavior clearly, validate changes before rollout, and iterate faster with confidence.
